sections.title: Pattern
rows: I recommend this cafe to you.
I do not recommend that hotel to you.

items.es: Te recomiendo este restaurante porque la comida es buena.
items.en: I recommend this restaurant because the food is good.

items.es: El museo vale la pena si te gusta la historia.
items.en: The museum is worth it if you like history.

items.es: No te recomiendo ese hotel porque está lejos del centro.
items.en: I do not recommend that hotel because it is far from downtown.

items.es: La playa es bonita, pero suele haber mucha gente.
items.en: The beach is pretty, but there are usually many people.

items.es: Si tienes tiempo, visita el mercado.
items.en: If you have time, visit the market.
